英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton於1505年之後出生在英國維爾爾斯圖頓時，他的父親Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton8536歲，母親Agnes Fauntleroy8532歲。他於大約1518年與Elizabeth Dudley在英國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1544年登記服兵役。他去世於1548年9月16日在英國素可紐哈文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton于1505年之后出生在英国維爾爾斯圖頓时，他的父亲Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton8536岁，母亲Agnes Fauntleroy8532岁。他于大约1518年与Elizabeth Dudley在英国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1544年登记服兵役。他去世于1548年9月16日在英国素可紐哈文。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton was born after 1505, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton, was 8536 and his mother, Agnes Fauntleroy, was 8532. He married Elizabeth Dudley about 1518, in England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1544. He died on 16 September 1548, in Newhaven, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton est né après 1505, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton, avait 8536 ans et sa mère, Agnes Fauntleroy, avait 8532 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Dudley environ 1518, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1544. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1548, à Newhaven, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton nach 1505 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton 8536 und seine Mutter Agnes Fauntleroy 8532. Er hat um 1518 in England Elizabeth Dudley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1544 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 16. September 1548 in Newhaven, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton è nato il dopo il 1505 nel Stourton, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton, aveva 8536 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Fauntleroy, aveva 8532 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Dudley circa 1518, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1544. Morì il 16 settembre 1548, nel Newhaven, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourtonが1505年以後にイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourtonは8536歳，母Agnes Fauntleroyは8532歳であった。約1518年にイギリスでElizabeth Dudleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1544年に兵役登録をした。彼は1548年9月16日にイギリススセックスニューヘイベンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton(이)가 1505년 이후 영국 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton(은)는 8536세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Fauntleroy(은)는 8532세였다. 그는 대략 1518년 영국에서 Elizabeth Dudley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1548년 9월 16일 영국 수세스 뉴하븐에서 사망했다.

mn.Stourton, Wiltshire, England: Stourton, Wiltūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton nasceu após 1505, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton, tinha 8536 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Fauntleroy, tinha 8532 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Dudley aproximadamente 1518, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1544. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1548, em Newhaven, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton родился после 1505 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton было 8536 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Fauntleroy, 8532. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Dudley около 1518 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1544 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 16 сентября 1548 г. в местности нюхавен, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton nació después de 1505, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton, tenía 8536 años y su mamá, Agnes Fauntleroy, tenía 8532 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Dudley aproximadamente 1518, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1544. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1548, en Newhaven, Sussex, Inglaterra.
